findings.title: products table is not the price-tier source
findings.evidence: All 34 Pro subs match a product but all 34 have monthly_price != products.price_monthly; catalog prices only 99/49; same product_id sold at 29/79/199.
findings.action: Use subscriptions.monthly_price as the price tier; do not join products for price.

findings.title: Event coverage excludes most cancellations
findings.evidence: Events 2025-03-07..2025-06-06; only 4 of 7 Pro cancels in window, 3 before.
findings.action: Treat H3 (engagement) as largely inconclusive; in-coverage subset descriptive only.

findings.title: 17% of Pro support tickets have null category
findings.evidence: 24 Pro tickets; category null 4/24 (17%); opened_by null 4/24 (expected).
findings.action: For H4 use ticket volume; category breakdowns indicative only.

findings.title: Small population caps confidence
findings.evidence: 7 canceled Pro subs (5 in 2025); no segment reaches significance.
findings.action: Descriptive full-population reporting; confidence Medium (price/tenure), Low (industry/support/engagement).
